title: oldenlandia radicans
intro: Oldenlandia radicans, also known as Radix isatidis or Yin chen hao, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia radicans include reducing fever, relieving cough and respiratory issues, and enhancing immune function. Traditionally, it is prepared as a decoction or infusion and can also be used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations.
